name: Auberon Eye Care Centre
tagline: Precision eye care, backed by decades of clinical expertise.
about: Auberon Eye Care Centre is the clinical arm of Auberon Pharmaceuticals, bringing together the precision of our pharmaceutical expertise with world-class ophthalmic care. From routine eye check-ups to complex surgical procedures, our team of experienced ophthalmologists is committed to protecting and restoring your vision.

features.title: Advanced Diagnostics
features.description: State-of-the-art diagnostic equipment for precise detection of eye conditions including glaucoma, cataracts, and retinal disorders.

features.title: GMP-Grade Medications
features.description: Direct access to Auberon's full ophthalmic range — manufactured in-house under strict GMP standards.

features.title: Expert Ophthalmologists
features.description: A dedicated team of experienced eye surgeons and specialists committed to personalised patient care.

features.title: Same-Day Consultations
features.description: Urgent eye care consultations available same day — no long waits, no compromises.

services.name: Eye Consultation
services.description: Comprehensive eye examination including vision testing, pressure measurement, and slit-lamp evaluation.

services.name: Cataract Surgery
services.description: Phacoemulsification cataract surgery with premium IOL implantation for crystal-clear vision.

services.name: Glaucoma Management
services.description: Complete glaucoma evaluation and long-term management including medication, laser, and surgical options.

services.name: Retina Clinic
services.description: Diagnosis and treatment of retinal disorders including diabetic retinopathy, ARMD, and retinal detachment.

services.name: LASIK Screening
services.description: Complete pre-LASIK evaluation to determine candidacy for laser vision correction surgery.

services.name: Paediatric Eye Care
services.description: Specialised eye care for children including squint correction, amblyopia treatment, and vision therapy.
